description_long: This is a shirtless adult male figure with a muscular build, adorned with a black top hat featuring metallic accents and goggles. He has long, straight hair that extends past his shoulders, and a green feather or leaf accessory is tucked behind his left shoulder. His arms are decorated with white armbands and wristbands, and he wears black pants with blue highlights and a white belt with pouches and holsters. The figure is equipped with a long, sheathed sword hanging from his left hip and wears fingerless gloves and metallic shoes. The overall appearance suggests a stylish, urban adventurer or street performer with a distinctive, slightly fantastical flair.
description: A shirtless, muscular adult male with a top hat, long hair, black pants, and a sword, styled as an urban adventurer with unique accessories.
description_view_0: Front view shows the top hat, facial features, chest tattoos, armbands, belt, and sword hilt clearly.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the long hair, feather accessory, sword sheath, and profile of the hat and face.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the full length of the hair, feather accessory, back details, and the sword's position.
description_view_3: Right side view shows the arm bands, belt, and the sword sheath hanging down, with a clear profile of the figure.
attribute_clothing_type: top hat with goggles, wristbands, armbands, belted pants with holsters, fingerless gloves, and metallic shoes
